belief_updates.name: Institutional Flow Primacy
belief_updates.description: OBV (On-Balance Volume) is the primary decision signal for all thesis-driven positions because it reflects actual institutional capital flows — not sell-side sentiment, not RSI levels, not analyst price targets. Four operational rules: (1) ENTRY: Rising OBV + thesis alignment justifies entry even when MACD is bearish — institutions are accumulating regardless of short-term momentum. (2) HOLDING THROUGH OVERBOUGHT: After earnings confirm the thesis, hold through RSI up to 80 as long as OBV continues rising. Only reduce when RSI exceeds 80 AND OBV begins falling simultaneously. (3) ANALYST SIGNALS: When a major sell-side downgrade triggers a selloff, check OBV immediately. Rising OBV during an analyst-driven selloff = institutions are buying what retail is selling — hold the thesis. (4) STOPS EXCEPTION: Pre-committed stop levels are honored regardless of OBV direction. Stops reflect the risk budget established before position bias forms. OBV cannot override stops because we cannot know when 'institutions are wrong' until the loss is unrecoverable.

lessons: EARNINGS BEAT + GUIDANCE REVISION SELLOFF: When a stock beats both revenue AND EPS estimates but posts revised (lowered) guidance, the stock frequently declines on the guidance disappointment regardless of the beat quality. The OBV signal becomes the critical arbiter in this scenario: (1) Rising OBV during the post-earnings guidance selloff = institutions view the guidance revision as conservative or manageable — they are buying what retail sells on the headline disappointment. Hold the thesis. (2) Falling OBV during the guidance-driven selloff = institutions are distributing into the earnings beat before guidance weighs further. Exit. This is distinct from Lesson 3 (analyst downgrades) — it specifically governs the common scenario where a company delivers results but guides cautiously below consensus. Applied to ARM Q3 2025: revenue and EPS both beat, guidance revised lower, stock slid — but OBV rising confirmed institutions were accumulating through the selloff. Thesis held.
